title: St. Louis Blues
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Frederick Hazlitt Brennan, Eleanore Griffin
actors: Dorothy Lamour, Lloyd Nolan, Tito Guízar
plot: A Broadway musical comedy star tires of the same old grind and flees the city. She runs into the skipper of a showboat who befriends her, and they make plans to put together a musical revue. But a competing carnival owner hatches ...
